name: claude-code-internals
description: Gives Claude source-level knowledge of its own architecture. 84 lessons covering every internal subsystem — hooks (all 27 event types), permissions (7-phase pipeline, 23 validators), boot sequence, agents, compaction (including marble-origami reversible collapse), MCP, memory, AskUserQuestion tool, and binary-verified new features through v2.1.111 (Remote Workflow Commands /autopilot /bugfix /dashboard /docs /investigate, server-side Advisor Tool, PushNotification + KAIROS mobile push, Context Hint API server-driven micro-compaction, Fullscreen TUI with /focus and /tui, Proxy Auth Helper, System Prompt GB Override, /less-permission-prompts, canary channel, slow first-byte watchdog).
